# BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BuildBundle

**Object**

The relationship to the Build Bundles resource you set with the request that creates a Beta App Clip Invocations resource.

## Declaration

```swift
object BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BuildBundle
```

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BuildBundle.Data**: The type and ID of the Build Bundles resource that you’re relating with the Beta App Clip Invocations resource you’re creating.

## Objects

- **BetaAppClipInvocationCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.BetaAppClipInvocationLocalizations**: The relationship to the Beta App Clip Invocation Localizations resource you set with the request that creates a Beta App Clip Invocations resource.
